notes:
An <Info> callout already existed immediately after the `flutter pub get` code block, referencing pub.dev for the latest version. Expanded it in place to add the 'only supported install method' statement per instructions (3 sentences). Exact callout text added:

"`pubspec.yaml` via pub.dev is the only supported installation method for the social.plus Flutter SDK. Find the latest version at [pub.dev/packages/amity_sdk](https://pub.dev/packages/amity_sdk). If you need to pin to a specific version or git ref, use Dart's standard [git-dependency syntax](https://dart.dev/tools/pub/dependencies#git-packages) in `pubspec.yaml` — no separate alternative install path is required."

No other content was modified.
